hero.headline: Six pathways for learning, creativity, and impact.
hero.subheading: Our programs are designed to help students, educators, and partners connect knowledge with action across classrooms, communities, and cultures.

intro.heading: A broader model of education.
intro.body: World Class Scholars brings together global exchange, digital creativity, inclusive care, innovation methods, and partnership-building in one ecosystem. Each program stands on its own, but together they form a powerful model for future-ready learning.
